---
title: "Skills & Credentials"
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}
### Technical Skills

**Languages**  
Python, SQL, R, PySpark  

**Data Engineering**  
Microsoft Fabric, Databricks  

**Visualization & Reporting**  
Power BI, Microsoft Excel, Figma  

**Workflow & DevOps**  
Jira, VS Code, GitHub  
:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
<!-- Spacer -->
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
### Certifications

* Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate
* Databricks Certified Data Engineer Associate
* Microsoft Certified: Fabric Analytics Engineer Associate
* Generative AI Fundamentals — Databricks Academy Accreditation
* Databricks Lakehouse Fundamentals — Databricks Academy Accreditation

### Awards

* 🥇 **Winner** — 12th ABA@BU Hackathon · Boston University
* ⭐ **Rising Star Award (BU: Data & RPA)** · iLink Digital
:::

::::
